recommended_fix: Move demo data behind fixtures and connect production UI to real data contracts.
Replace placeholder content with domain-realistic data and explicit data scope.
Add scope, period, filter, and freshness copy near each metric.
acceptance_criteria: Top metrics and table values expose period/scope/source/freshness and can be traced to real data contracts.
Re-run ADSI gate and reduce this area severity below 2 before release.

lorem ipsum sample data for John Doe at john@example.com
recommended_fix: Replace dead href with a real route, disabled state explanation, or remove CTA.
Provide a real fallback path, permission reason, or release-gated state.
Pair each alert with owner, next action, due time, and filtered worklist route.
acceptance_criteria: Each alert, metric, or problem card has a concrete CTA, owner, route, or disabled-state reason.
Re-run ADSI gate and reduce this area severity below 2 before release.

recommended_fix: Move styling to design-system primitives or tokens unless truly dynamic.
Prefer named spacing/color/radius tokens for repeatable component design.
Prefer semantic color tokens and document new token additions.
acceptance_criteria: New UI uses shared primitives/tokens; raw style exceptions are documented and minimal.

recommended_fix: Add meaningful alt text or alt="" for decorative images.
Add aria-label or visible text for icon-only controls.
Use button/a semantics or add role, tabindex, and keyboard handlers.
acceptance_criteria: Interactive elements have accessible names, keyboard path, visible focus, and non-color-only status cues.

areas.name: Layout & Responsiveness
evidence: [fixed-px] sloppy_dashboard.html:11 — Fixed pixel dimension found. Evidence: ef="#">Review
recommended_fix: Use responsive constraints, min/max, grid/flex, and breakpoint tokens.
acceptance_criteria: Screen is verified at mobile/tablet/desktop breakpoints without accidental horizontal overflow.

recommended_fix: Use domain-specific visual hierarchy instead of decorative gradients.
Keep transparency effects only where they improve usability.
Use brand/domain color semantics rather than generic AI palette.
acceptance_criteria: Visual identity supports product/domain meaning instead of generic AI-dashboard decoration.

areas.name: Production Readiness
evidence: [no-error-handling] sloppy_dashboard.html:22 — Empty error handling found. Evidence: 'pending' }]         console.log(mockData)         try { throw new Error('x') } catch (e) {}       </script>     </main>   </body> </html>

recommended_fix: Surface recoverable error states and log useful diagnostics.
Use structured telemetry or remove debug logs.
acceptance_criteria: Loading, empty, error, permission, observability, and automated verification are present for production paths.

summary: Demo after-audit used to exercise ADSI diff command.
priority_fixes: A Realisme Data & Domain: Move demo data behind fixtures and connect production UI to real data contracts.
B Kejelasan Workflow: Replace dead href with a real route, disabled state explanation, or remove CTA.
G Aksesibilitas: Add meaningful alt text or alt="" for decorative images.
F State & Status Logic: Create a status taxonomy table with dimensions, allowed values, and UI placement.
I Orisinalitas Visual: Use domain-specific visual hierarchy instead of decorative gradients.

engine.name: ADSI static heuristic engine
limitations: Static engine cannot see runtime interaction unless paired with `adsi collect`; use `adsi contrast` for computed contrast.
Use static scan as CI first-pass, browser collection for DOM evidence, and agent review for workflow judgment.
